ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eutran_cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the cell is located */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the E-UTRA cell */,
  "a3offset" INTEGER /* Offset value for A3 event trigger */,
  "hysteresisA3" INTEGER /* Hysteresis value for A3 event trigger */,
  "timeToTriggerA3" INTEGER /* Time to trigger for A3 event */,
  "triggerQuantityA3" INTEGER /* Quantity of triggers for A3 event */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band used by the cell */,
  "transmit_power" REAL /* Transmit power of the cell */,
  "antenna_height" REAL /* Height of the antenna */,
  "antenna_tilt" REAL /* Tilt angle of the antenna */,
  "sector_id" TEXT /* Sector ID if the cell is part of a sector */,
  "sector_angle" REAL /* Angle of the sector */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the cell */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the current configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eutran_cells_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the E-UTRA cell whose configuration was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "previous_version" TEXT /* Version number of the previous configuration */,
  "revert_possible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change can be reverted */,
  "revert_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reverting the change if applicable */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch ID if the change was part of a batch update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES eutran_cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the E-UTRA cell being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES eutran_cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the E-UTRA cell involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the event */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES eutran_cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the E-UTRA cell whose performance is being measured */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES eutran_cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the E-UTRA cell associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES eutran_cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
